# veeam_credential (Resource)

Manages a Veeam credential (Standard or Linux).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password for the credential.
- `type` (String) Credential type: `Standard` or `Linux`.
- `username` (String) Username. For domain accounts use `DOMAIN\user` format.

### Optional

- `add_to_sudoers` (Boolean) Automatically add to sudoers (Linux only).
- `authentication_type` (String) Authentication type for Linux: `Password` or `PrivateKey`.
- `description` (String) Optional description.
- `elevate_to_root` (Boolean) Elevate to root via sudo (Linux only).
- `passphrase` (String, Sensitive) Private key passphrase (Linux only).
- `private_key` (String, Sensitive) SSH private key (Linux only, PrivateKey auth).
- `root_password` (String, Sensitive) Root password for su elevation (Linux only).
- `ssh_port` (Number) SSH port (Linux credentials only, default 22).
- `use_su` (Boolean) Use su instead of sudo (Linux only).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Credential identifier (assigned by the server).
